extra.reason: Created tests/table_index_tests.rs with 47 passing tests covering table CRUD, scans, index operations (Bloom, R-Tree, TimeSeries, FullText, Graph), table+index integration, composite index patterns, concurrent access, error handling, edge cases, property-based invariants, and performance benchmarks. 2 tests ignored for known issues (HNSW node loading nanokv-w5o, drop_table engine registry cleanup).
Replaced bincode with postcard across all serialization points in sstable, manifest, btree, and fulltext modules. All relevant tests pass.

Implemented node loading and storage using page-based persistence. Added serialize_node/deserialize_node for binary serialization, store_node/ update_node for page storage, load_node for page retrieval, connect_nodes for bidirectional graph connections, and prune_connections for connection limit enforcement. Fixed insert_vector to store node once and update in place. All 5 HNSW tests pass.
SSTable writer footer bug was already fixed. Removed #[ignore] attributes from test_data_persistence_lsm_table and test_mixed_operations_with_persistence tests. All 10 integration tests now pass.

Enabled test_compaction in lsm_tree_integration_tests.rs. The test creates a Version with L0 files exceeding size limits, uses CompactionPicker to select a compaction job, and verifies compaction job properties including source/target levels, file counts, priority, and estimated output size.
Implemented test_bloom_filter_operations test using existing BloomFilter insert/contains methods and BloomFilterBuilder
Implemented test_lsm_mvcc with comprehensive MVCC snapshot isolation tests covering version visibility at different LSNs, tombstone/deletion visibility, and multi-key version scenarios
Implemented test_memtable_operations test with insert, get, and delete operations using the fully exposed Memtable API

Fixed FullText apply during transaction commit by changing FullTextSearch trait methods from &mut self to &self (implementation already uses RwLock for interior mutability). Enabled the commented-out apply code in transaction commit. Changed fulltext_write_set to use RwLock for interior mutability.
